validation_rules.requirement: Client meals capped at $75/person and 50% deductible per IRS rules.
validation_rules.action: Flag any single meal over $75/person for review before reimbursement.
validation_rules.notes: Applies to on-site client visits only.

validation_rules.requirement: IRS standard business mileage rate applies (67 cents/mile for 2026).
validation_rules.action: Reject entries missing origin/destination or odometer notes.
validation_rules.notes: Owner is sole driver; personal vehicle Nissan Rogue.

validation_rules.requirement: Client-billed hardware must be paired with an invoice line item within 14 days.
validation_rules.action: Move to A/R follow-up queue if unmatched after 14 days.
validation_rules.notes: Ubiquiti distributor invoices are the primary source.

validation_rules.requirement: Certification exam fees pre-approved by owner; study materials up to $250/quarter without further approval.
Home office utility share fixed at 12% of household utility bills.

context: Rivera IT Solutions LLC is a sole-proprietor consultancy. Owner (Justin Rivera) is the only person filing reimbursements. Policy exists to keep bookkeeping clean for CPA Wagner and to keep records IRS-audit-ready.
